summary: Buffered persistent-settings middleware with defaults, dirty tracking, and deferred save scheduling.
notes: Override PersistentSettings_OnDefaults(...), PersistentSettings_OnLoad(...), and PersistentSettings_OnSave(...) in AppCallbacks to connect this middleware to EEPROM, Flash, FRAM, or any other storage backend.
After changing values in the settings buffer, call PersistentSettings_MarkDirty(...) so the scheduled task can commit them later without blocking the main loop.
sources: Generic embedded settings-cache pattern with deferred commit.
